summary: FAIR signals on this page follow a public-first policy: local build artefacts improve readiness, but full findability and accessibility require publicly established publication infrastructure. External OOPS! and FOOPS! results are reported separately as observability signals so service outages do not masquerade as ontology quality.

fair_signals.label: F / Findable
fair_signals.detail: Public-first release score for identifiers, versioning, citation, and publication establishment. Local build assets alone do not yield full credit.

fair_signals.label: A / Accessible
fair_signals.detail: Public-first release score for machine-readable outputs, documentation, resolver state, and publication establishment. Local files alone do not yield full credit.

fair_signals.label: I / Interoperable
fair_signals.detail: Purely internal release-quality score for reuse of imports, mappings, namespace hygiene, and standards-based serializations.

fair_signals.label: R / Reusable
fair_signals.detail: Purely internal release-quality score for license, provenance, versioning, definitions, examples, and release packaging.

transparency_hooks.label: OOPS! ontology pitfall scan
transparency_hooks.detail: OOPS! service unavailable: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='oops.linkeddata.es', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /rest (Caused by NewConnectionError("HTTPSConnection(host='oops.linkeddata.es', port=443): Failed to establish a new connection: [WinError 10013] An attempt was made to access a socket in a way forbidden by its access permissions"))

transparency_hooks.label: FOOPS! FAIR assessment
transparency_hooks.detail: FOOPS! service unavailable: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='foops.linkeddata.es', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /assessOntologyFile (Caused by NewConnectionError("HTTPSConnection(host='foops.linkeddata.es', port=443): Failed to establish a new connection: [WinError 10013] An attempt was made to access a socket in a way forbidden by its access permissions"))

validation_signals.label: Overall validation status
validation_signals.detail: Combined metadata, namespace, mapping, and SHACL validation checks.

validation_signals.label: SHACL conforms
validation_signals.detail: Local SHACL shape execution when pyshacl is available.

validation_signals.label: Duplicate @id conflicts
validation_signals.detail: Duplicate source nodes are tolerated only when they merge without schema-type conflicts.

validation_signals.label: Missing labels
validation_signals.detail: Release-time missing labels on local schema terms.

validation_signals.label: Missing definitions
validation_signals.detail: Release-time missing definitions or comments on local schema terms.

validation_signals.label: Namespace violations
validation_signals.detail: Violations against the active namespace policy.

validation_signals.label: Mapping issues
validation_signals.detail: Mappings that remain risky or inconsistent after local checks.

validation_signals.label: OWL consistency hook
validation_signals.value: not enabled in current environment (owlready2 not installed)
validation_signals.detail: Optional OWL reasoner hook. It is non-blocking and only runs when owlready2 is installed.

validation_signals.label: EMMO checks
validation_signals.value: not enabled in current environment (EMMOntoPy not installed)
validation_signals.detail: Optional EMMO convention hook. It is non-blocking and only runs when EMMOntoPy is installed.

publication_assets.label: HTML reference page
publication_assets.detail: Generated documentation assets. Public availability is tracked separately from local generation.

publication_assets.label: Machine-readable source
publication_assets.detail: Primary Turtle serialization for the release candidate.

publication_assets.label: JSON-LD source
publication_assets.detail: JSON-LD serialization for the release candidate.

publication_assets.label: Alignment mappings
publication_assets.detail: Conservative alignment output for review and publication.

publication_assets.label: Release bundle
publication_assets.detail: Bundle status depends on whether the current command executed the release-bundle stage.

publication_assets.label: w3id artifacts
publication_assets.detail: Resolver templates may be prepared locally even when public resolver registration is still pending.

section_explanations.fair_signals: FAIR signals are public-first release indicators. Local artefacts and metadata improve readiness, but full Findable and Accessible credit requires publication to be explicitly established.
section_explanations.transparency_hooks: External service rows report what third-party assessment services returned, or state clearly when they were unavailable.
section_explanations.validation_signals: Validation signals summarize local structural, metadata, namespace, mapping, SHACL, and optional non-blocking hook checks on the release candidate.
section_explanations.publication_assets: Publication asset rows distinguish assets that were prepared locally from those explicitly treated as publicly established.
